candidates.name: Process_makeCommandStr
candidates.signature: void Process_makeCommandStr(Process* this, const Settings* settings)
candidates.documentation: This function makes the merged Command string. It also stores the offsets of the basename, comm w.r.t the merged Command string - these offsets will be used by Process_writeCommand() for coloring. The merged Command string is also returned by Process_getCommand() for searching, sorting and filtering.
